scripts.prebuild: npm run copy:assets && npm run build:papers
scripts.copy:assets: cp -f ../renders/output/*.mp4 public/videos/ 2>/dev/null || true; cp -f ../renders/test_frames/*.png public/posters/ 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.build:papers: mkdir -p public/papers && for f in ../papers/*.tex; do [ -f "$f" ] && pandoc --from latex --to html5 --mathjax "$f" -o "public/papers/$(basename $f .tex).html"; done
